description.zh-Hans: 使用随机游走迹线生成电路板/PCB风格图案，具有正交路径、圆角和焊盘标记。由于其顺序路径路由特性，仅支持CPU执行。
description.en: Generates circuit-board / PCB-style patterns using random-walk traces with orthogonal paths, corner rounding, and solder pad landmarks. CPU-only due to sequential path-routing nature.

triggers.zh-Hans: 电路, 电路板, PCB, 电路图案
triggers.en: circuit, circuit board, PCB, trace pattern

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成一个电路板风格的背景图案，用于科技感像素艺术场景。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a circuit board style background pattern for a tech-themed pixel art scene.
